name: hackathon-skills
description: Claude Code skills for running a hackathon end-to-end: rubric-aware kickoff, a phase router, and a multi-speaker pitch timeboxer.

plugins.name: hackathon-skills
plugins.description: Rubric-aware kickoff, phase router, and pitch timeboxer for hackathon teams. Pairs with superpowers (brainstorming), gstack (qa/design), ui-ux-pro-max (UI polish), and anthropic's pptx skill (slides) — see SCENARIOS.md.
